title: Senior Solution Architect within Wealth & Asset Management Tech | SEB, Stockholm
description:
SEB is more than just a bank with a technology function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From COBOL to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.
   

  

 Are you a Senior Architect with a deep knowledge within the wealth and asset management area? Do you thrive in strategic roles where architecture, business and large-scale transformation meet? If so, this could be a great opportunity for you!
   

  

**What will you be doing?**
 In this role you will be focusing on our custody transformation program and play a pivotal role in driving and guiding our strategic transformation from an end-to-end perspective. The custody transformation program is one of SEB’s key initiatives for developing our savings and investments offering. By modernising our custody infrastructure, we are building a modern next generation custody platform.
   

  

 You will actively guide and contribute to this ongoing large-scale digital transformation and help build completely new capabilities to position SEB as an industry leader within the wealth and asset management area (i.e. investments and trading in stocks, funds and other financial instruments). You will collaborate extensively with technology and architecture stakeholders across the organization, as well as business and business services representatives.
   

  

**Your responsibility will be to:**
* Shape and drive SEB’s architecture transformation agenda for the wealth and asset management area with focus on the custody transformation program. A key to success is close collaboration with other parts of SEB regarding e.g. front-end applications, business layers, ledgers, authorization, cloud, API, AI and data management.
* Drive change, transformations and modernizations towards our target architecture.
* Propose and implement future-ready, modern, secure and stable solutions which attract and service our clients and gain their trust.
* Interact with other architects in relevant parts of SEB to be able to align and materialize your architecture roadmaps. You will also be part of the SEB architect community and both the programs and Wealth Asset Management architecture design authorities.
* Build, develop, and maintain strong relationships with internal and external stakeholders to truly understand needs, anchor your ideas and shape sustainable solutions.
* Finally, you will be part of a team of solution architects focusing on the Wealth and Asset Management area. The team is led by the domain architect for the area that you will interact closely with.


**Who are you?**
* Well-anchored in Tech, with architecture experience across different technical platforms and ensures plans are grounded in an understanding of current technologies, client requirements, and emerging opportunities.
* At least 5 years professional experience as a Solution Architect.
* End-to-end understanding of wealth, savings, trading and investment services, processes and client needs from a digitalization perspective.
* Proven track record of successful architecture-driven changes in a highly complex environment.
* Outstanding relationship-building and interpersonal skills, with the ability to foster trust among stakeholders and partners. Maintains a strong commitment to delivering tangible solutions through a focused, goal-driven approach.
* Advanced oral and written communication abilities, adept at articulating concepts, visualizing architectural roadmaps, and engaging effectively with stakeholders across Business, Business Services, and Tech.
* Employs a pragmatic yet creative mindset to develop innovative and sustainable solutions for complex business challenges.
* Takes personal responsibility for achieving and delivering impactful, high-value outcomes.


**It’s a strong plus if you have**
* Experience from being the Lead Solution Architect for a larger transformation.
* Hands-on experience driving modernization from legacy platforms to modern cloud solutions.
* Designing AI components in solutions.


**What We Offer**
* Agile and modern ways of working
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Hybrid work model
* Innovative company at the forefront of technology


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-05-25. If you have questions about the position, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner Linn Odén at linn.oden@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.

title: Investment Banking Analyst to Real Estate Loan Origination | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Step into a challenging career with our market-leading Real Estate Loan Origination team, where you’ll drive impactful transactions across the Nordics and build an extensive network within a dynamic finance sector. This role offers rapid growth and deep integration into high-profile deals from inception to closing.
   

  

 Since SEB was founded in 1856, our focus on customers and long-term relationships has been at the heart of our success. We aim to drive positive change by providing capital to help everyone reach their goals and accelerate progress towards a sustainable tomorrow. As a leading financial services group in northern Europe, we’ll help you grow and empower you to take on more responsibility to create a real difference. Welcome to SEB.
   

  

**About the role:**
 Real Estate Loan Origination is a specialist team focusing on financing the largest and most high-profile transactions in the real estate market. We advise our clients, who range from listed companies to private equity firms, on their transactions and financing. The team is based in Stockholm, covering all the Nordic markets, and focuses mostly on M&A financing and transactions involving several lenders/investors. As a leading financier we also cooperate extensively with our Investment Banking colleagues at Corporate Finance (M&A/ECM) and DCM, meaning that this role will provide you with an opportunity to build an extensive network both in the market and within our institution.
   

  

 We are looking for a highly ambitious candidate with a willingness to learn fast and develop within the team. As an Analyst you will be deeply integrated in the transaction process, all the way from idea generation and pitching through client meetings and negotiations to closing.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* MSc. degree with competitive grades, preferably in Finance or Accounting
* Up to 2 years of experience in Investment Banking, Real Estate, Consulting, or a similar role
* Fluency in both Swedish and English
* High proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint
* A strong analytical mindset combined with excellent communication skills


**What we offer:**
* Possibilities to reskill by shifting areas/departments and location
* A diverse, inclusive and equal environment
* Long-term stability and growth as a company
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Opportunity to build connections with a top-level customer network


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-05-25. If you have questions about the position, please contact Johan Lund, Head of Real Estate Loan Origination at +46 70 772 32 87 or Petra Lundström, Associate at +46 70 739 14 88, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.

title: Client Analyst, Corporate Segment - Business Banking  | SEB Stockholm
description:
We are excited to announce an opportunity to join our Business Banking team in Stockholm as a Client Analyst!
   

  

 Are you interested in working with our division Business and Retail Banking's larger corporate customers and develop your skills in credit analysis, credit risk and non-financial risks? Then you could be the person that we are looking for!
   

  

 Business Banking is a prioritized business area for SEB, aiming to further develop and grow our market share. Business Banking oversees SEB’s risk, profitability, and relationships for a portfolio of mid-corporate customers across the Corporate, Public, Real Estate and Financial Advisory segments.
   

  

 Currently we are ranked second in the Prospera customer satisfaction survey, and our goal is to lead the industry in customer satisfaction over time. We are committed to growing both with existing clients and by onboarding new, targeted companies.
   

  

 We are looking for a Client Analyst to join our team in Stockholm to continue our journey on developing and growing Business Banking.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Joining our team based in Stockholm, you will play an integral role in servicing some of our most valuable clients. We work in client teams, meaning that you work closely with the Client Executive and Cash Management Specialists.
   

  

 Your role as a Client Analyst will be focused on maintaining a “Deal Ready” client portfolio. Your main tasks will involve planning and facilitating credit decision memos, as well as monitoring and maintaining high credit quality, regulatory, and compliance documentation. You are expected to take an active part in the customer dialog as well as developing and maintaining close relationships with our internal stakeholders. This role presents a wealth of learning opportunities, making it an exciting and rewarding career path.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 We are looking for individuals with a curious and analytical mindset, a team player with passion for learning and the drive to succeed in a high paced environment servicing sophisticated clients. To be successful in this role, you should have a strong commitment to your team and actively contribute to an open, collaborative, and inclusive work culture.
   

  

 We believe you have:
   

  

* relevant work experience and a genuine interest in working with corporates in the banking sector
* an academic degree within a relevant field of study
* good communication skills in Swedish and English, both written and oral
* experience in financial modeling or equivalent data analytical skills


**What We Offer**
 You will be part of an ambitious group that emphasizes teamwork and collaboration, which we believe are essential to our success in a highly competitive market and make our work more rewarding and enjoyable. You will be given the opportunity to work with one of SEB´s most exciting customer groups and a dynamic part of the credit markets. You will widen your network within the SEB Group, enhance your knowledge of the client segment and become a center of competence in many areas.
   

  

**Ready to take the next step in your career journey?**
 Ready to apply? Please include a short introduction about yourself and what you would bring to the role, together with your CV. We encourage you to apply as soon as possible, but no later than 27th May 2026, as we review applications on an ongoing basis. If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact Christopher Magnusson, Head of Client Analysts Stockholm, christopher.magnusson@seb.se. Please note that we cannot accept any applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means this position may be filled through internal redeployment.

title: Supporttekniker IT
description:
Vill du arbeta i en roll där teknik, service och samarbete möts varje dag? Som Supporttekniker IT hos oss på Tre får du möjlighet att lösa problem, stötta våra användare och driva tekniska initiativ som gör verklig skillnad för verksamheten!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 I rollen blir du en viktig kontaktperson internt och ansvarar för att våra medarbetare får snabb och professionell IT-support i sin vardag. Oavsett om det handlar om tekniska problem, nya arbetsverktyg eller support kring arbetsplatsutrustning är du personen som skapar trygghet, struktur och en smidig användarupplevelse.
   

  

 Du kommer att bli en del av vår IT-supportavdelning och ingå i ett nordiskt team bestående av totalt 14 medarbetare. I det dagliga arbetet samarbetar du nära med sex kollegor i Stockholm och fyra i Köpenhamn, där samarbete, kunskapsdelning och hjälpsamhet är en naturlig del av vardagen. Tillsammans arbetsroterar ni mellan telefon- och platsbaserad support för att ge bästa möjliga stöd till användarna.
   

  

 I rollen arbetar du med installation, konfigurering och felsökning av datorer, mobila enheter och annan IT-utrustning samt hantering av användarkonton och behörigheter i moderna Microsoft-miljöer. Du säkerställer att våra interna system och arbetsverktyg fungerar stabilt och smidigt. Parallellt driver du även tekniska projekt där du med och skapar ännu bättre IT-upplevelse för hela verksamheten.
   

  

**Du kommer se fram emot att**
* samarbeta nära andra avdelningar såsom Infrastruktur, Kommunikation och Facility Management för att säkerställa tekniska lösningar och fungerande arbetsmiljöer i verksamheten
* ha en varierad roll med både tekniska utmaningar och nära kontakt med verksamheten
* göra verklig skillnad genom att hjälpa och stötta medarbetare i deras vardag
* vara en del av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser enligt Great Place To Work samt att vi är stolt samarbetspartner till Women in Tech och Tjejer Kodar


 I rollen utgår du ifrån 3huset vid Globen, Stockholm, men då vi även ger support mot vårt butiksled inom Sverige kan det förekomma kvällar- och helgresor med övernattning.
   

  

 ,
   

  

**Mer om dig**
 Vi söker dig med några års erfarenhet från en liknande roll inom IT-support eller intern IT, där du är van att arbeta nära användare och ge teknisk support i vardagen. Du har med fördel en gymnasieutbildning med IT-inriktning eller annan relevant IT-utbildning.
   

  

 Goda kunskaper i Windows samt god vana av Microsoft 365 och andra Microsoft-baserade system ser vi som nödvändigt för att kunna göra ett bra jobb. Kunskap i MacOS är meriterande, men inget krav. Du har god teknisk förståelse och ett intresse för hur IT-miljöer hänger ihop, där grundläggande nätverkskunskap är en fördel då många ärenden ofta kan kopplas dit.
   

  

 B-körkort är ett krav då arbetet kan innebära insatser på olika platser i verksamheten. Då vi verkar i en internationell miljö behöver du kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska samt ha god engelska i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Vi tror att rollen kommer passa dig bra som tycker om att hjälpa andra och som motiveras av att skapa bra service och lösa problem på ett pedagogiskt och professionellt sätt. Du är kommunikativ, prestigelös och har förmågan att möta människor med tålamod och engagemang, även i ett högt tempo. Ett starkt teknikintresse och en nyfikenhet på nya tekniska lösningar ser vi som en stor tillgång i rollen.
   

  

**Din ansökan**
 Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och kommer hålla intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat.
   

  

 För mer information om tjänsten kontakta rekryterande chef Johnny Rask: Johnny.Rask@3.dk
   

  

 Varmt välkommen till Tre!

title: Software Tester
description:
**We are the designers of today for the world of tomorrow.** 




 As one of the world's leading engineering service providers, we at ALTEN are committed to positively shaping the future of our partners, the careers of our employees and the challenges facing our society and environment.
 



 More than 50,000 employees in 30 countries are already working on innovative solutions in various engineering and IT sectors such as aerospace, renewable energy, medical technology, railway technology and automotive.
 



  





**POSITION AND MISSION** 



* Continuous update of software and hardware to secure verification and validation in HIL test beds and test vehicles for the latest software baselines
* Perform sanity checks to verify the integrity and functionality of software updates
* Fault tracing, diagnosis and troubleshooting of software and platform issues
* Technical documentation according to customer standards
* Escalate issues arising from software and vehicle platforms to the right stakeholders
* Use automated flows for software download - Define required vehicle data and logs
* Collect vehicle data and capture test logs
* Perform initial root cause analysis on vehicle or component level



  





**The Ideal Profile** 



* Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Software Engineering, Embedded Systems Engineering, or a related field
* Strong interest in testing and validation
* Working knowledge of SWDL and diagnostics on embedded systems
* Experience in troubleshooting on HIL systems such as dSPACE, Vector or National Instruments
* Experience in fault tracing, diagnosis and troubleshooting on end-to-end vehicle systems - Knowledge of vehicle communication protocols, especially CAN
* Fluency in English

title: QA specialist / Test automation engineer in Analytics & Reporting | SEB, Solna
description:
Join us to pioneer test automation and shape our tech landscape, combining your Java expertise with exciting GCP challenges in a brand new setup. This is a unique opportunity to lead the way in building innovative reporting & analytics solutions within a progressive tech environment.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.
   

  

**About the role:**
 As a QA specialist and Test automation engineer in Analytics & Reporting, you will be part of an innovative, agile team that embraces experimentation and continuous learning. You will contribute to making SEB a more data-driven bank by working on initiatives such as customer reporting, push notifications, and regulatory reporting.
   

  

 You’ll be instrumental in establishing our test automation capabilities from the ground up, as there is currently no test automation within the team. This exciting opportunity means designing and pioneering robust frameworks and building test automation cases. Your expertise will be vital in leveraging regression testing in GCP. Simultaneously, you will engage partially in manual testing, handle communication with stakeholders and make sure we are working accordingly to the TDD process. This blend of roles offers a unique chance to shape our future technology landscape.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Experience with BDD (Behavior-Driven Development) methodology and Test Automation tools
* Few years of experience in manual testing
* Experience working with GitHub and GitHub Actions
* Good understanding of programming; with knowledge in Spring Boot Java, Kubernetes and Splunk
* Knowledge of distributed event streaming systems like Kafka
* Someone who likes to work according to best practices and deliver high quality software craftsmanship
* A positive team player willing to take ownership
* Positive attitude with strong motivation to continuously learn and adapt
* Excellent English skills


**Merits:**
* Any experience in Public Cloud (GCP preferred)


**What we offer:**
* Agile and modern ways of working, hybrid
* Work in the forefront of modern techniques
* Supportive skilled colleagues who value openness and teamwork
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* A diverse and distributed team across multiple sites


**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 1st of June.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.

title: Molnspecialist till sektionen Datacenter och plattformar – bidra till Regeringskansliets digitala utveckling
description:
****Sektionen för datacenter och plattformar, RK it-drift och underhåll, digitaliseringsavdelningen****
 Regeringskansliet är mitt i en omfattande digital förnyelse. Med innovation som drivkraft utvecklar vi digitala arbetssätt, samarbetsformer och lösningar som gör vardagen enklare och mer effektiv. Här drivs ett antal större initiativ, från bred förflyttning till molntjänster till implementering av generativ AI. Det är ett omfattande arbete och därför behöver vi bli fler.
   

  

****Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.****
 Vårt uppdrag är unikt. Vi är med och bygger en del av Sveriges digitala ryggrad. Våra tjänster används i Regeringskansliet och på över 100 utlandsmyndigheter världen över.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en eller flera molnspecialister där du blir du en nyckelperson i vår molnresa och i utvecklingen av moderna, säkra och effektiva plattformstjänster.
   

  

****Om rollen****
 Som molnspecialist ansvarar du för att förvalta, utveckla och optimera Regeringskansliets Microsoft 365‑ och molnplattformar. Du arbetar med identitet och åtkomst i Entra ID, automatisering med PowerShell och Infrastructure-as-Code samt deltar i design och implementation av molnarkitektur.
   

  

 Rollen omfattar även arbete med governance, övervakning och kostnadsoptimering samt att agera tekniskt stöd vid incidenter och förändringsinitiativ. Du samarbetar nära andra IT‑funktioner och bidrar till utvecklingen av våra plattformstjänster.
   

  

 Du samarbetar nära andra teknikområden inom IT samt bidrar till den fortsatta utvecklingen av våra plattformstjänster.
   

  

****Din bakgrund****
**Krav:**
* Har du högskoleutbildning eller annan eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT eller för tjänsten relevant område, alternativt annan arbetslivserfarenhet som vi bedömer som likvärdig?
* Erfarenhet av Microsoft 365 och Entra ID (Azure AD)
* Erfarenhet av PowerShell
* Erfarenhet av identitets- och åtkomsthantering samt informationsskydd (t.ex. DLP)
* God kunskap om Zero Trust-principer
* Mycket god svenska och god engelska i tal och skrift


**Meriterande:**
* Certifieringar inom exempelvis MS‑900, MS‑700, MD‑102 eller SC‑300
* Djup kompetens inom Exchange Online, SharePoint Online och OneDrive
* Erfarenhet av Microsoft Teams, gärna med telefoni och compliance
* Erfarenhet av Intune/Endpoint Manager
* Kunskap om CI/CD och verktyg som GitHub eller Azure DevOps
* Erfarenhet av övervakning med Azure Monitor, Log Analytics och alerts


****Dina egenskaper****
 Som person är du en lagspelare med god samarbetsförmåga och kommunikativ styrka. Du tar initiativ och ansvar för dina uppgifter och driver arbetet framåt på ett strukturerat sätt.
   

  

 Regeringskansliets medarbetarkriterier är helhet, utveckling och resultat. Du förväntas bidra med din kompetens och ditt perspektiv, vara öppen för andras idéer samt aktivt bidra till verksamhetens utveckling.
   

  

****Övrigt****
 Rollen är en tillsvidareanställning som inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Befattningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas. Du måste vara svensk medborgare, men får gärna ha utländsk bakgrund.
   

  

 Läs mer på Medarbetarskap och ledarskap i Regeringskansliet - Regeringen.se
   

  

****Är du intresserad?****
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder kontakta Anton Berglie som är sektionschef på 08-405 21 94. Du är också välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsspecialist Filip Ristov på 08-405 54 99. Fackliga kontakter är Johan Strokirk för Saco Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når dem via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00.
   

  

 Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan
 **senast den 8 juni 2026**
 Regeringskansliets uppdrag är att stödja regeringen i dess arbete med att styra Sverige och förverkliga sin politik. Här arbetar 4 800 personer, varav 600 utomlands. Regeringskansliet välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter. Vi ser jämställdhet och mångfald som en styrka och tillgång och vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering. Förvaltningsavdelningen ansvarar för myndighetsövergripande frågor som förändrings- och förnyelsearbete, ekonomi, arbetsgivarfrågor, kompetensförsörjning, kommunikation, säkerhet, it, bibliotek, arkiv och registratur samt för den gemensamma servicen i Regeringskansliet.

title: Junior Solutions Engineer
description:
**Junior Solutions Engineer med utvecklingspotential till senior roll** 




**Brinner du för startupvärlden, att lära dig mycket och snabbt axla större ansvar? Är du en person som både uppskattar social kontakt och gillar teknisk problemlösning? Ansök nu!** 




  





 För vår kunds räkning söker vi en medarbetare som kan bidra till att utveckla leveranskapaciteten och de interna arbetssätten samt på sikt växa in i en senior roll. Som de själva beskriver det: “If you want to work hard and be rewarded for it, we will give you everything we have”.
 



  
 



 Företaget implementerar programvara och förmedlar konsulttjänster inom IT till nordiska företag för att digitalisera och effektivisera deras verksamhet. Du kommer att tillbringa de första tre månaderna med att skugga CTO:n och lära dig hela värdekedjan: kravinsamling, konfiguration, kundkommunikation, testning och kunskapsöverföring. Du kommer att utveckla dina strategiska och tekniska färdigheter under nära mentorskap samt genomgå certifieringsprogram.  
 



  





 Efter upplärningsperioden kommer ditt arbete att bestå av lika delar implementering av mjukvarulösningar och projektledning, utan kodning. Du förväntas efter sex månader självständigt kunna bistå kunden och äga hela värdekedjan från kick-off till go-live, inklusive presentationer inför deras team. Företaget kräver inte teknisk eller kommersiell arbetserfarenhet, men ser det som meriterande. Det viktigaste är ett starkt engagemang som belönas med snabb karriär- och löneutveckling. Här kan du känna dig trygg i att ditt hårda arbete ger direkt resultat och uppskattning.
 



  





 Vi tror att du
 



  




* är ambitiös och inte planerar att sluta efter 12 månader
* trivs i en miljö där ingen ger dig en färdig process, utan där du kan vara med och bygga den
* kan hantera många bollar i luften
* tycker om att prata med kunder
* omsätter din nyfikenhet till handling



 Krav
 



  




* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift
* Goda kunskaper i engelska (används internt och i kommunikation med leverantörpartners)
* Genuint intresse för teknik och för hur system fungerar under ytan
* Förmåga att snabbt sätta dig in i nya domäner och tekniska lösningar
* Självständigt arbetssätt, initiativförmåga och förmåga att driva egna åtaganden i mål
* Möjlighet att vara 100% på plats på kontoret i Stockholm (Strandvägen) under onboardingperioden månad 1–3



 Meriterande:
 



  




* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom systemvetenskap/civilingenjör
* Har på eget initiativ lärt sig ett tekniskt verktyg eller AI-system
* Har testat olika saker, startat egna projekt eller bolag, provat olika branscher eller utbildningar eller på annat sätt utforskat din väg



 Särskilt meriterande:
 


* Tidigare erfarenhet av en kundnära roll eller försäljning (tex. telefonförsäljning, customer success, dörrknackning eller B2B-sälj)



  





 I denna roll lägger du grunden för ett brett nätverk inom Stockholms explosiva startupscen genom ett snabbväxande bolag med starka grundare och investerare i ryggen. Tempot är högt och du kommer att se din insats göra skillnad varje vecka. Kulturen är ambitiös, noggrann och lagspelande, där årliga resor till Spanien och Amsterdam samt frekventa gruppmiddagar bidrar till teamandan. 
 



  





 Kickstarta din karriär eller ta nästa steg i din utveckling. Företaget är tydligt: de söker en person, inte ett CV. 
 



  





 Ansök Nu! https://app.emplifier.ai/candidate/job/x/junior-solutions-engineer

title: Product & Project Manager
description:
**Surgical Science** 
 is a global organisation and leading provider of medical training simulations and software solutions.
 



  





 Together with healthcare partners and customers in more than 90 countries, we enhance patient safety and healthcare outcomes through evidence-based, state-of-the-art simulation technology that improves clinical proficiency and performance — enabling safe and effective training without putting patients at risk.
 



  





 Our solutions are used by medical training centres, universities, hospitals, and the medical device industry for practice, assessment, and certification.
 



  





 With offices in Gothenburg, Stockholm, Tel Aviv, Cleveland, Cardiff, and Shenzen, we are a fast-growing and stable organisation in a rapidly evolving world. We foster a hybrid work culture that supports onsite and remote collaboration across teams and time zones.
 



  





**Job Summary:** 




 We’re looking for a
 **Product Manager** 
 who thrives at the intersection of
 **product strategy and project execution** 
 . This role is a 50/50 blend of
 **Product Management and Project Management** 
 , combining responsibility for development processes with ownership of project delivery across multiple concurrent initiatives.
 



  





 You will work closely with development teams, customers, and internal stakeholders across different locations and time zones, driving initiatives from product concept through delivery while ensuring high-quality results. It is a hands-on position for someone comfortable switching between product thinking, stakeholder alignment, and day-to-day execution.
 



  





 The role is located in
 **Stockholm** 
 (Kista). You will report to Senior Director, Product Manager.
 



  





 Your responsibilities will include:
 



  





**Product Management** 



* Manage the product development process from product concept through launch
* Work closely with development teams across the company.
* Work closely with industry customers to understand product purpose and customer training needs.
* Develop educational materials such as step-by-step videos and clinical procedural guidance.
* Prepare marketing and educational materials to support products in the field to ensure customer satisfaction.
* Support the product line lifecycle from strategic planning through tactical activities in collaboration with your manager.



  





**Project Management** 



* Lead multiple concurrent software projects with varying scope, timelines, and budgets
* Drive planning, execution, tracking, and delivery with distributed teams across time zones
* Own delivery commitments, risk management, and project governance
* Manage project budgets and delivery costs
* Act as the primary delivery contact for customers and internal stakeholders



  





**Requirements:** 



* BSc in for example Biology/life science/bio-medical engineering/Medical or other medical background.
* Minimum 3 years of experience in product management, project management, or a hybrid role in software development.
* Proven ability to manage multiple initiatives
* Experience working with distributed teams and external customers
* Hands-on experience with agile development (Scrum, Kanban, or similar)
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Comfortable owning both planning and day-to-day execution
* Experience with project financials, budgets, or delivery cost tracking
* Proficiency with tools such as Jira, Monday.com, and Office tools
* Fluent in written and spoken English
* Willingness to travel occasionally



  





**Nice to Have:** 



* Background in simulation, medical devices, gaming, or technical product management
* Experience writing PRDs or structured product documentation
* Experience improving or scaling product/project processes
* Power BI or analytics tools
* PMP, CSM, or similar certifications



  





**Benefits:** 



* 🌍 Global environment (English as primary language)
* 💻 Hybrid work
* ⌚️ Flexible working hours
* 🏩 (Optional) Private healthcare
* 💚 Wellness allowance (Friskvårdsbidrag)
* 🚲 (Optional) Bicycle lease



  





**Surgical Science as an employer** 




 Surgical Science is a global and continuously expanding organisation. You will be part of a dynamic, creative environment where we make sure to allow all employees to influence and contribute with their own unique experiences and knowledge.
 



  





 Guided by our core values —
 **curiosity, respect,** 
 and
 **perseverance** 
 — we strive to empower our people by recognising their strengths, supporting their growth, and creating opportunities to make a real impact.
 



 We invite you to join us on this exciting and meaningful journey — to shape the future of medical training and improve care for patients around the world.
 



  





**Apply today!** 




 If you think you would fit our fantastic team and enjoy our work environment, apply as soon as possible as recruitment is ongoing. Let us meet and work out together whether we are a match! We kindly request that you apply with a
 **CV in English.**

title: Data Engineer
description:
Join EQT as a Data Engineer in the Client Tech Value Stream, where you will build and scale our modern data platform. You will work across the full data lifecycle, enabling reliable, high-quality data products that support decision-making across the business.
   

  

**About The Client Tech Value Stream Team**
 The Client Tech Value Stream focuses on delivering technology and data solutions that support client, investor, and fund-related processes. The team works closely with engineering, product, CRM, and business stakeholders to build scalable platforms that enable insights and operational efficiency across EQT.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will play a key role in designing, building, and operating EQT’s cloud-based data platform. You will work across ingestion, transformation, and data modeling to ensure high-quality, reliable, and accessible data.
   

  

* Design, build, and operate scalable data pipelines across multiple data sources.
* Ingest data from APIs, external platforms, Fivetran connectors, and cloud storage.
* Develop and maintain data models using dbt on Snowflake.
* Structure data around core business entities such as clients, investors, funds, and transactions.
* Enable analytics and reporting in tools such as Power BI, Salesforce CRM Analytics, Tableau and our AI stack.
* Monitor and troubleshoot pipelines to ensure reliability and performance.
* Collaborate with stakeholders across engineering, analytics, CRM, and business teams.
* Contribute to platform improvements and modernization of legacy pipelines.
* Support infrastructure and access management using GitHub, Terraform, and Snowflake.


**About You**
 You are an experienced Data Engineer who enjoys working across the full data stack and collaborating with diverse teams. You are comfortable working in a modern cloud environment and translating business needs into scalable data solutions. You are curious about AI and new technology, and can translate both human and machine needs into code.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* Experience building data pipelines and working with cloud data platforms.
* Experience collaborating with nontechnical stakeholders for requirements and maintenance.
* Strong SQL skills and experience with data modeling for usage by reporting tools and LLM models.
* Experience with Snowflake and dbt or similar tools.
* Experience integrating data from multiple systems such as APIs and SaaS platforms.
* Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
* Experience with version control and infrastructure tools such as Git and Terraform.


**Nice to have:**
* Experience with GCP and Fivetran.
* Experience working with CRM systems such as Salesforce.
* Understanding of financial or private markets data.


**What We Offer**
 You will be part of a collaborative and forward-looking team where data is central to how EQT creates value. We offer opportunities to work with modern technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and grow your skills in a global environment.
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Junior Product Application Engineer - Nordic Graduate Program
description:
We are looking for a motivated graduate to join Schneider Electric’s Nordic Graduate Program in Sweden as a
 **Junior Product Application Engineer within Power Systems** 
 . This role is designed for early‑career engineers who want to build strong technical foundations, gain hands‑on experience, and start a long‑term career while contributing to the sustainable energy transition.
   

  

 As a graduate at Schneider Electric, you will work closely with experienced colleagues on real customer cases, develop your technical and commercial skills, and grow both professionally and personally throughout the program.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Graduate Product Application Engineer, you will join our Power Systems Sales team with a focus on
 **Medium Voltage secondary equipment** 
 in Sweden. You will support presales activities and collaborate closely with sales teams, customers, contractors, and partners to deliver competitive and sustainable power solutions.
   

  

 You can be based in any of our offices in Sweden, with a preference for Stockholm.
   

  

 What you will do
   

  

* You will support presales technical activities related to Medium Voltage solutions, working closely with sales teams and key partners such as panel builders, kiosk builders, and contractors. You will help support Medium Voltage solutions for end‑user customers either together with the sales organization or based on incoming requests.
* You will contribute to recommending EcoStruxure IoT preferred architecture solutions and support discussions around system design and implementation. You will also support the promotion of our Medium Voltage hero offerings, including RM and SM Airset, in the Swedish market.
* Together with customers and internal teams, you will contribute to solution definitions and provide support on technical topics such as feasibility, constraints, performance, and system principles.


 Collaboration and learning
   

  

* You will work closely with end‑user sales, utility sales, panel builders, and contractors. You will collaborate across sales and marketing teams and continuously build your technical competence within Power Systems, Medium Voltage, and IoT‑based solutions.
* Throughout the program, you will be supported in your development and encouraged to contribute to a positive, collaborative, and inclusive work environment aligned with Schneider Electric’s values.


 Who you are
   

  

* You are a recent graduate with a degree in Energy Systems Engineering or Power Systems Engineering and have a strong interest in electricity, power distribution, and sustainable energy solutions.
* You are curious, eager to learn, and motivated to apply your academic knowledge in a real business and customer‑facing environment. You enjoy working in teams, are proactive, open minded, and result oriented.
* You are fluent in Swedish and English, both spoken and written.


 Program details
   

  

 The program runs from September 2026 to May 2027 and is based in Sweden.
   

  

 This is a paid graduate program, and you will continue your career with Schneider Electric after the program concludes.
   

  

 Ready to start your journey
   

  

 If you are passionate about power systems, technology, and sustainability, and are ready to take your first career step in a global company, we encourage you to apply to the Nordic Graduate Program at Schneider Electric.
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €40 billion global revenue
   

  

 +9% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Data Scientist, Subscriptions
description:
The Subscriptions Mission drives the growth and evolution of the Spotify business, ensuring we deliver compelling value to hundreds of millions of subscribers worldwide. We are focused on building the right set of offerings, plans, and value propositions that attract new subscribers and deepen engagement with existing ones.
   

  

 You'll join the Portfolio Data Science team, part of Subscriptions Product Insights. The Portfolio Focus Area is responsible for evolving and adapting Spotify's existing subscription plans to drive subscriber growth and engagement, as well as creating new revenue streams through add-ons and new value propositions. This work requires coordination across the entire Subscriptions Mission and multiple focus areas, with ownership and oversight from the Portfolio leadership team.
   

  

 As a Data Scientist on this team, you'll help the Portfolio team make informed decisions about how to grow and diversify Spotify's paid offerings. You'll analyze subscriber behavior, measure the impact of plan changes and new propositions, and surface insights that shape our strategy. Your work will directly influence how the Spotify experience evolves for users around the world.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Analyze subscriber behavior and engagement patterns to identify opportunities for plan evolution and new value propositions
* Design and analyze experiments to measure the impact of changes to subscription plans and add-on offerings
* Define and maintain success metrics for Portfolio initiatives, ensuring alignment across cross-functional partners
* Build and maintain dashboards and reporting to monitor the health and performance of subscription plans and new revenue streams
* Perform exploratory analyses that uncover growth levers and inform the Portfolio roadmap
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Design, User Research and other Data Science teams across the Subscriptions Mission
* Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, including senior leadership
* Use AI-powered tools (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) to accelerate analysis and workflows


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 3+ years of experience in data science or analytics, ideally at a consumer tech or subscription-based company
* You hold a degree in Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience)
* You are proficient in SQL and Python and comfortable working with large-scale datasets
* You have experience designing and analyzing A/B tests, with a solid understanding of statistical methods
* You are a clear communicator who can translate complex analyses into actionable recommendations
* You are curious, proactive, and comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast-moving business
* You enjoy collaborating across teams and are comfortable working in environments that require coordination across multiple stakeholders and workstreams


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in New York, Stockholm or London.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 The United States base range for this position is 94,585 - $135,121, plus equity. The benefits available for this position include health insurance, six month paid parental leave, 401(k) retirement plan, monthly meal allowance, 23 paid days off, paid flexible holidays, paid sick leave. These ranges may be modified in the future.
   

  

 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Analytics Solution Officer - based in Luxembourg
description:
This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence. The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support. The EIB, the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for its Group Information Systems Directorate (GIS), Data & Corporate Solutions Department (DCS), Data Management Division (DM), Analytics & Reporting Unit (AR) at its headquarters in Luxembourg, an
 **Analytics Solution Officer** 
 \*.
   

  

**This is a full-time position at grade 5 for which the EIB offers a permanent contract.**
* internal benchmark Officer IT Applications


***Panel interviews are anticipated for June/July 2026***
 Purpose
   

  

 The Analytics Solution Officer ensures the stable, efficient and high‑quality delivery, evolution and governance of business‑critical IT applications and services supporting EIB Group business processes. The role exists to safeguard continuity of service, strengthen service delivery governance, and support the Bank’s ongoing modernisation initiatives by coordinating internal teams and external service providers in line with IT strategy, policies and contractual commitments.
   

  

 The role focuses on the ownership and continuous evolution of analytics solutions, ensuring reliable operations while supporting ongoing change.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 The role sits within the Analytics and Reporting Unit, which is responsible for the end‑to‑end lifecycle of analytics and reporting solutions supporting EIB Group business processes. This includes solution ownership, service delivery, vendor coordination and contribution to change initiatives.
   

  

 The post holder works closely with business stakeholders, IT counterparts, senior management and external providers, and reports directly to the Head of Unit.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

* Ensure end‑to‑end ownership and day‑to‑day delivery of analytics solutions and related services, maintaining availability, performance, security and compliance with internal standards.
* Manage the full lifecycle of assigned solutions, from planning and sourcing through implementation, operation and controlled evolution, including roadmaps and service models.
* Coordinate and steer external providers in a multi‑vendor setup, ensuring effective business‑as‑usual operations and measurable service performance through regular follow‑up, controls and reporting.
* Support the definition and execution of externalisation initiatives, ensuring clear ownership, effective controls, service assurance and compliance with contractual obligations.
* Liaise with business stakeholders, internal IT teams and external partners to translate functional needs into sustainable analytics solutions.
* Contribute to project and delivery activities related to the acquisition of software and services, ensuring consistency with business priorities, enterprise architecture principles, IT security requirements and applicable policies.
* Support continuous improvement of analytics platforms and services by identifying optimisation opportunities, promoting standardisation and reducing solution complexity where appropriate.
* Maintain awareness of functional and technical evolutions of the platforms within the area of responsibility, advising stakeholders on relevant enhancements, options and implications.
* Ensure appropriate governance, documentation, risk management and reporting across service delivery and change activities.
* Support operational resilience through active involvement in incident handling, change coordination and issue escalation in collaboration with relevant parties.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in Engineering, Information Technology, Information Management, Economics/Finance or a related field.
* At least 5 years of relevant professional experience in analytics solution delivery, analytics platforms or reporting environments, including solution lifecycle or delivery coordination.
* Proven experience working with external service providers in a multi‑vendor or outsourced environment.
* Hands‑on experience with Power BI, including report development and platform administration (experience with Microsoft Fabric is an asset).
* Exposure to data, reporting or analytics platforms and environments.
* Experience with other business intelligence and analytics tools such as SAP BusinessObjects, SAP Analytics Cloud or Tableau is considered an asset.
* Good understanding of application lifecycle management, IT service management principles and delivery governance.
* Experience in coordinating projects involving multiple stakeholders and disciplines.
* Experience in Data Warehouse design and methodologies would be an asset.
* Ability to work effectively in a multicultural, international organization.
* Excellent knowledge of English and/or French (\*) with a good command of the other. (Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage).


 Competencies
   

  

**Find Out More About EIB Core Behavioural Skills Here**
 To find out more about our eligibility criteria click here
   

  

*(\*) Unless stated explicitly as a required qualification, a good command of French is not a pre-requisite for hire. As both English and French are however official working languages of the EIB, proficiency in both languages is a pre-requisite for your future career development. Any language clause in your contract must be fulfilled in order for you to be eligible for a promotion (either via the annual appraisal cycle or via an internal selection process). Proficiency is understood to mean the attainment of* 
*level 5 of the Inter Institutional language courses, corresponding to B1.2 of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFRL). The Bank offers appropriate training support.*
 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

 Deadline for applications:
 **21st May 2026**

title: IAM Engineer
description:
**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, implement, and manage enterprise IAM solutions across cloud and on-prem environments.
* Configure and support authentication and authorization mechanisms including SSO, MFA, and identity federation.
* Manage Identity Providers (IdPs) and federation protocols such as OAuth2 and OpenID Connect.
* Administer certificate lifecycle management and PKI infrastructure including SSL/TLS certificates.
* Build and maintain secure DevSecOps pipelines and infrastructure automation.
* Deploy and manage containerized applications using Kubernetes, Docker, and OpenShift.
* Implement Infrastructure-as-Code solutions using Terraform, Ansible, and Helm.
* Troubleshoot complex IAM, authentication, network, and infrastructure-related issues.
* Collaborate with security, infrastructure, cloud, and application teams to ensure secure access management.
* Ensure compliance with enterprise security standards and best practices.
* Support cloud platform integration and security enhancements within AWS environments.

title: IT-säkerhetsspecialist till Must
description:
**Vill du använda din erfarenhet inom mjukvara och IT-säkerhet för att** 
**bidra till ett säkrare Sverige i en osäker värld? Då ska du söka dig till oss på avdelningen för krypto och IT-säkerhet på Must! Vi söker nu IT-säkerhetsexperter som vill arbeta med att ta fram de kryptosystem och IT-säkerhetskomponenter som skyddar Sveriges säkerhet.**
 Som IT-säkerhetsexpert på avdelningen för krypto och IT-säkerhet får du möjlighet att arbeta i en miljö där erfarenhet värderas högt, där beslut grundas i teknisk förståelse och där säkerhet är en grundförutsättning – inte ett tillägg. Hos oss värdesätts säkerhet, kvalitet och långsiktighet högre än snabba genvägar.
   

  

 Vi strävar efter att ligga i teknisk framkant och ser kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling som en självklar del av arbetet. Hos oss får du tid, förtroende och stöd att fördjupa dig inom ditt expertområde. Vi samarbetar även nära med andra myndigheter och organisationer, både i Sverige och internationellt.
   

  

**Vårt erbjudande**
 Vi erbjuder ett viktigt och stimulerande arbete där du dagligen bidrar till Sveriges säkerhet. Vi erbjuder också mycket goda möjligheter till kompetensutveckling. Hos oss finns det friskvårdsmöjligheter som inkluderar träning tre timmar i veckan på arbetstid, samt goda förutsättningar till balans mellan fritid och arbete.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Rollen är tydligt inriktad på mjukvara och mjukvarunära IT-säkerhet. Rollen passar dig som vill ta ansvar, påverka tekniska vägval och bidra med djup expertis. Arbetet bedrivs i projektform där du får arbeta tillsammans med några av Sveriges ledande IT-säkerhetsexperter.
   

  

 I arbetet ingår bland annat att:
   

  

* kravställa och granska kryptosystem, protokoll och IT-säkerhetskomponenter, samt testa och verifiera implementationer av dessa
* utvärdera säkerhetsarkitekturer, identifiera sårbarheter, genomföra säkerhetstester, granska kod och ställa krav på produkter och produktutveckling
* utveckla våra policyer, standarder och metoder inom IT-säkerhetsområdet
* bedriva kontinuerlig och systematisk omvärldsbevakning.


**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* erfarenhet inom IT-säkerhet och/eller mjukvaruutveckling, alternativt annat för tjänsten relevant område
* akademisk utbildning inom relevant område eller motsvarande kompetens förvärvad genom arbetslivserfarenhet
* erfarenhet av utveckling i ett etablerat systemprogrammeringsspråk, exempelvis C eller C++
* god förmåga att läsa och skriva teknisk dokumentation på både svenska och engelska.


**Meriterande**
 Det är meriterande, men inte ett krav, om du har:
   

  

* erfarenhet av att designa, utveckla och leverera säkerhetskritiska system
* vana att granska och identifiera brister i design och implementation av säkerhetskritisk mjukvara
* erfarenhet av olika utvecklingsmetodiker och att producera robust mjukvara
* en djup förståelse för hur operativsystem fungerar, exempelvis Linux eller Windows
* erfarenhet av inbyggda system eller anpassning av säkerhetsfunktioner i Linux eller Windows
* kunskap om systemarkitektur, domänseparation och begrepp som principle of least privilege
* erfarenhet av penetrationstestning eller reverse engineering
* kunskap om signalskyddssystem
* erfarenhet av arbete i Försvarsmakten.


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Du brinner för IT-säkerhetsområdet och har en stark motivation att ständigt lära dig mer. Dina kunskaper och erfarenheter delar du gärna med andra. För att nå goda resultat är du bra på att samarbeta, bygga relationer och tar ansvar för ditt eget arbete. Du är även lösningsorienterad, prestigelös, strukturerad, resultatinriktad och noggrann.
   

  

 Vid urval kommer stor vikt att läggas vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Ovan ställda kvalifikationer ska på begäran kunna verifieras genom intyg, referenser samt arbets- eller urvalstester.
   

  

*För att myndighetens uppdrag ska vara framgångsrikt förutsätts att alla medarbetare uppträder enligt den värdegrund som finns. Försvarsmaktens värdegrund slår vakt om alla människors lika värde, rättvisa och jämlikhet och främjar demokrati och mänskliga rättigheter (läs mer på* 
*www.forsvarsmakten.se* 
*).*
**Övrigt**
 Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning som inleds med provanställning om sex månader
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Arbetsort: Stockholm
   

  

**För upplysningar om befattningen eller rekryteringsprocessen kontakta:**
 hkv-rekrytering-must@mil.se, vänligen skriv ”IT-säkerhetsexpert - mjukvara” i ämnesraden.
   

  

**Fackliga företrädare**
 Nås via hkv-rekrytering-must@mil.se
   

  

*Varmt välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-06-01. I ditt CV och personliga brev vill vi att du beskriver på vilket sätt du uppfyller våra efterfrågade krav och meriter. Du ansöker via* 
*jobb.forsvarsmakten.se. Urval sker löpande.*
 ,
 **Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via Försvarsmaktens webbplats.** 
 -------------------------------------------------------- Militära underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänsten (Must) är en del av Försvarsmaktens högkvarter i Stockholm. Vi ger regeringen och Försvarsmakten kvalificerade beslutsunderlag om omvärldsutvecklingen och hot mot Sveriges och Försvarsmaktens säkerhet. Vår vision är ”Ett säkrare Sverige i en osäker värld”. Must är en kunskapsorganisation och erbjuder både spännande och för Sverige angelägna arbetsuppgifter. Här arbetar både officerare och civila experter inom olika områden, t ex statsvetenskap, IT, ekonomi, teknik, matematik och HR. En stor del av Must verksamhet omfattas av sekretess och vi ber dig därför att inte berätta att du sökt jobb hos Must för andra personer än dina närmaste. Läs gärna mer om Must och vår verksamhet här Varje dag och varje timme gör våra medarbetare insatser som påverkar andra människors liv, både i stort och smått, och både på hemmaplan och runt om i världen. Försvarsmakten ger dig möjlighet att utvecklas som människa och växa i din professionella roll. Vi är en ansvarstagande arbetsgivare och har en öppen organisation där vi ställer upp för varandra. I Försvarsmakten finns en stark värdegrund som bygger på öppenhet, resultat och ansvar. Professionell utveckling och personlig hälsa värdesätts och uppmuntras. Det finns goda förutsättningar för intern karriärrörlighet, friskvård och bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Försvarsmakten tillvaratar de kvaliteter som mångfald och jämn könsfördelning tillför verksamheten. Vi välkomnar därför sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter i våra rekryteringar. En anställning hos oss innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. I anställningen ingår även en skyldighet att tjänstgöra utomlands. Innebörden av detta varierar beroende på typ av befattning. Till ansökan om anställning ska CV och personligt brev bifogas. Om du går vidare i anställningsprocessen ska alltid vidimerade kopior av betyg och intyg uppvisas. Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

title: Director Analyst – Infrastructure Cybersecurity (Remote: Europe)
description:
**About the role:**
 Gartner analysts are industry thought leaders who create must-have insight and provide advice to a broad range of world-leading organizations. A Director, Analyst possesses a keen eye for identifying gaps, problems and solutions within the market they serve, and help clients make better decisions relative to their highest business priorities. As an analyst, you will bring Gartner's best practices, and tools to life across a broad range of world class clients. Your focus will be on both the pragmatic content that assists a client in solving today’s problems, and provocative insight that challenges a client’s assumptions on how the future will play out.
   

  

 Key areas of coverage with be in infrastructure cybersecurity technologies that allow infrastructure and IT operations groups to mitigate cyber risk and lay the foundation for continued success and growth. Knowledge (and intellectual curiosity) in areas such as, SASE, SSE, Zero Trust, cloud security, endpoint security, and patch management are important. You will apply your broad knowledge of technologies, vendors, processes, and best practices to provide actionable insights to our clients.
   

  

**What you will do:**
* Research, analyze and predict expected (and foresee unexpected) market trends and shifts to provide end-user organizations and vendors with actionable insights.
* Remain ahead of the curve on developments and issues within the specified areas as well as applicable adjacent areas of emerging technologies.
* Collaboratively write and publish analysis and positions at a regular cadence through evidence-based research
* Communicate complex concepts concisely and with authority via virtual or face-to-face interactions with senior-level executives.
* Present at multiple conferences as an industry expert.
* Partner with sales and service delivery partners to increase account growth, retention, and engagement


**What you will need:**
* Bachelor's degree required; advanced degree preferred.
* 12+ years of experience in infrastructure cybersecurity, secure networking architecture, or related IT domains, preferably within forward‑leaning enterprise environments.
* Knowledge of major infrastructure cybersecurity offerings from vendors such as Palo Alto Networks, Netskope, Cato Networks, Fortinet, Cisco, Zscaler, CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, and Microsoft
* Ability to analyze, formulate, and clearly articulate technology and business adoption scenarios, helping senior IT leaders understand opportunities, risks, and implementation pathways for both existing and emerging infrastructure cybersecurity technologies.
* Expertise in modern infrastructure security models, including SASE, SSE, Zero Trust, and identity‑centric security frameworks, with additional expertise in the design and optimization of secure enterprise networking.
* Key understanding of cloud security, endpoint security, patch management, backup and recovery, and disaster recovery best practices
* Knowledge and intellectually curiosity on emerging cyber threats to IT infrastructure such as post-quantum attacks, AI-powered cyber attacks, and multi-layer extortion ransomware attacks
* Strong working knowledge of industry cybersecurity frameworks such as NIST CSF 2.0, ISO/IEC 27001, ISO 42001, and NIST AI RMF
* Understanding of geopolitical and sovereign workloads requirements in different regions as they relate to infrastructure security and compliance
* Deep familiarity with major cybersecurity infrastructure and services offerings, including U.S. and international service providers, managed security services, and emerging vendors and technologies influencing the security and networking landscape.
* Broad understanding of enterprise connectivity and security drivers, such as cloud adoption, distributed workforces, application modernization, and increasing reliance on integrated security-networking architectures.


 #Remote
   

  

**Who are we?**
 At Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT), we guide the leaders who shape the world.
   

  

 Our mission relies on expert analysis and bold ideas to deliver actionable, objective business and technology insights, helping enterprise leaders and their teams succeed with their mission-critical priorities.
   

  

 Since our founding in 1979, we’ve grown to 20,000 associates globally who support over 13,000 client enterprises in ~90 countries and territories. We do important, interesting and substantive work that matters. That’s why we hire associates with the intellectual curiosity, energy and drive to want to make a difference. The bar is unapologetically high. So is the impact you can have here.
   

  

**What makes Gartner a great place to work?**
 Our vast, virtually untapped market potential offers limitless opportunities – opportunities that may not even exist right now – for you to grow professionally and flourish personally. How far you go is driven by your passion and performance.
   

  

 We hire remarkable people who collaborate and win as a team. Together, our singular, unifying goal is to deliver results for our clients.
   

  

 Our teams are inclusive and composed of individuals from different geographies, cultures, religions, ethnicities, races, genders, sexual orientations, abilities and generations.
   

  

 We invest in great leaders who bring out the best in you and the company, enabling us to multiply our impact and results. This is why, year after year, we are recognized worldwide as a great place to work.
   

  

**Gartner is the world authority on AI**
 At Gartner, you’ll join a company at the very center of the AI revolution. Gartner has proactive, objective guidance throughout clients’ AI journeys. We set the standard for how organizations leverage artificial intelligence to drive meaningful impact. You’ll have access to unmatched resources, expertise, and technology, and play a key role in helping Gartner and our clients innovate and grow as we leverage AI to transform business and technology landscapes.
   

  

 It’s an exciting time to be at Gartner, with limitless opportunities to make a real impact, grow your skills, and build a lasting, meaningful career in a field that’s reshaping the way we operate. If you’re passionate about AI and want to be part of a team that’s guiding the leaders who shape the world, Gartner is the place for you.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
 Gartner offers world-class benefits, highly competitive compensation and disproportionate rewards for top performers.
   

  

 In our hybrid work environment, we provide the flexibility and support for you to thrive — working virtually when it's productive to do so and getting together with colleagues in a vibrant community that is purposeful, engaging and inspiring.
   

  

 Ready to grow your career with Gartner? Join us.
   

  

 The policy of Gartner is to provide equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, citizenship status, age, national origin, ancestry, disability, veteran status, or any other legally protected status and to seek to advance the principles of equal employment opportunity.
   

  

 Gartner is committed to being an Equal Opportunity Employer and offers opportunities to all job seekers, including job seekers with disabilities. If you are a qualified individual with a disability or a disabled veteran, you may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Company’s career webpage as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by calling Human Resources at +1 (203) 964-0096 or by sending an email to ApplicantAccommodations@gartner.com.
   

  

 Job Requisition ID:107354
   

  

 By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you have read and agree to the country or regional recruitment notice linked below applicable to your place of residence.
   

  

 Gartner Applicant Privacy Link: https://jobs.gartner.com/applicant-privacy-policy
   

  

**For efficient navigation through the application, please only use the back button within the application, not the back arrow within your browser.**

title: Data Analytics Engineer
description:
Are you ready to be a key contributor within the Data & Analytics Engineering department at NOBA Bank Group? Your focus will be on advancing analytics capabilities, optimizing data workflows, driving innovation in the cloud, and unlocking the full potential of the organization’s most valuable asset – data.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Data & Analytics Engineering department comprises specialized teams focused on Data Infrastructure Engineering, Analytics Engineering, and Data Management.
   

  

 As a Data Analytics Engineer, you'll play a central role in building and optimizing the organization's supporting analytics layer, collaborating across the bank. This role offers broad opportunities to grow and make a tangible impact!
   

  

 We offer a hybrid working model with two common in-office days. While we value flexibility, we also prioritize collaboration, team-building, and enjoying fikas and after-work gatherings together!
   

  

**Main Tasks**
* Design and implement efficient data models, focusing on analytics workflows and end-user usability.
* Build robust and scalable data pipelines to support business intelligence and analytics needs.
* Collaborate closely with internal stakeholders, such as Risk, Finance, and IT, to ensure data solutions align with business needs.
* Ensure data quality, security, and compliance throughout the analytics lifecycle.
* Drive technical improvements, introducing modern tools and processes to enhance analytics capabilities.
* Partner with other engineers to align transformation processes for analytics purposes.


**We Are Looking For Someone Who**
 Enjoys working with data & analytics engineering, modern data practices, and creating insights that drive decisions. We believe you are a detail-oriented and proactive person who thrives in a high pace enviroment and enjoy learning new technologies. You approach challenges with a “can-do” attitude and excel in analytical thinking and problem-solving.
   

  

**For This Role You’ll Need**
* Work experience in a similar role within data engineering or analytics engineering
* An academic degree related to analytics engineering, data engineering, or similar fields.
* Proficiency in ETL processes, designing analytics-ready datasets, and ensuring clean and usable data for stakeholders.
* Proficiency in Databricks, dbt (SQL), python and related reporting tools and languages.
* Experience with Power BI or similar BI tools.
* Strong English skills, with proficiency in Swedish and/or Norwegian.


**It’s a Plus If You Have**
* Experience with Microsoft’s data stack (Azure, SQL, and other cloud services).
* Experience working with on-prem solutions.
* A background in data roles within the financial sector.
* Knowledge of Agile and Scrum methodologies.


**Our Offer To You**
* Freedom with Responsibility: Flexible working arrangements to suit your work style.
* Career Development: Opportunities to grow and develop in your role.
* Feedback Culture: A supportive environment that encourages open communication.
* Coaching Leadership: Managers who guide and support your career journey.
* A Caring Company Culture: We genuinely care about each other!


 In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values:
 **we are wholehearted, we collaborate and we take the lead.**
**Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?**
 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
